---
title: "Sometimes a Language Model Is Just a Language Model"
description: "An amusing example from a Gary Marcus and Ernest Davis article."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-08-22"
categories: [NLP, NLG, GPT-3, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Marcus and Davis on language models. Image from [MIT Technology Review](https://www.technologyreview.com/2020/08/22/1007539/gpt3-openai-language-generator-artificial-intelligence-ai-opinion/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

The most amusing example in an article by Gary Marcus and Ernest Davis.

Sometimes a language model is just a language model.

<https://lnkd.in/gRRVf95>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_the-most-amusing-example-in-an-article-by-activity-6703014676999094272-w8vS).*
